ORSTED.CO — regulated utility, no pricing power, stressed balance sheet
VWS.CO — capital-intensive wind OEM, commodity equipment

VZ — utility-like telecom, no pricing power, heavy capex

INGA.AS — European banking, no moat, credit cyclicality

HSBA.L — global banking, China exposure, restructuring

concentration_warnings: bucket large_cap_europe_quality exceeds 25%: actual 27.2% — driven by optional 6th web search supplementing European coverage

priority_high: post_earnings|52wk_low|52wk_high|fcf_roic in source_bucket AND mkt_cap_tier in {mega,large}
priority_medium: any curated sector bucket in source_bucket (no high trigger)
triage_yes: already_analyzed=false AND priority=high AND confidence in {high,medium}
triage_maybe: priority=high but no fresh event catalyst
